name: Praia da Barrinha from Praia do Furadouro
name_original: Praia da Barrinha a partir da Praia do Furadouro
region_intro: Touring cycling around Ovar offers a network of routes through diverse natural landscapes. The region is characterized by its extensive cycle path network, including dedicated lanes along the coast, between dunes, and through pine forests. Ovar is situated along the northern section of the Ria de Aveiro, a shallow coastal lagoon, providing unique environmental and scenic qualities for cycling. The terrain is generally flat to gently undulating, making it suitable for various cycling abilities. Best touring cycling routes around Ovar The most popular touring cycling route is Praia da Barrinha from Praia do Furadouro, a 16.9 miles (27.2 km) trail that takes 1 hour 38 minutes to complete. This easy route offers views of the coast and the Barrinha de Esmoriz natural area. Another top favourite among local touring cyclists is Grande Rota da Ria de Aveiro - Ovar Loop, a moderate 31.6 miles (50.9 km) path. This route explores the unique landscapes of the Ria de Aveiro, including its waterways and surrounding natural areas. Local touring cyclists also love the Rua da Praia Sul - CicloRía – Maceda Picnic Area  loop from Ovar, a 19.9 miles (32.0 km) trail leading through coastal areas and pine forests, often completed in about 2 hours 6 minutes. Touring cycling around Ovar is defined by coastal paths, the Ria de Aveiro lagoon, and shaded pine forests. The network offers options for different ability levels, from easy family rides to longer, moderate routes. The routes in Ovar are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.1 stars from over 60 reviews. More than 370 touring cyclists have used komoot to explore Ovar's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many touring cycling routes are available in Ovar?
A: Ovar offers a good selection of touring cycling routes, with over 20 routes available on komoot. These routes cater to various skill levels, including easy, moderate, and some more challenging options.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on touring cycling routes in Ovar?
A: The terrain in Ovar is generally flat to gently undulating, making it suitable for a wide range of cyclists. You'll find routes along the coast, through pine forests, and beside the tranquil Ria de Aveiro, offering varied and scenic landscapes without significant climbs.

Q: Are there family-friendly touring cycling routes in Ovar?
A: Yes, Ovar is an excellent destination for family cycling. Many routes feature gentle slopes and dedicated cycle paths, making them safe and enjoyable for all ages. The extensive network of built paths, approximately 40 km, includes many options perfect for a leisurely family outing.

Q: Can I find circular touring cycling routes in Ovar?
A: Yes, there are several circular touring cycling routes in Ovar. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1386829762/grande-rota-da-ria-de-aveiro-ovar-loop" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Grande Rota da Ria de Aveiro - Ovar Loop&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 31.6-mile (50.9 km) path that explores the unique lagoon landscapes. Another option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/23740934" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Rua da Praia Sul - CicloRía – Maceda Picnic Area 🍎 loop from Ovar&lt;/a&gt;, which takes you through coastal areas and pine forests.

Q: What natural features or landmarks can I see along the touring cycling routes?
A: Ovar's routes offer diverse natural beauty. You can explore the unique &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/528323" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ovar Canal 🌊 Aveiro Lagoon&lt;/a&gt;, the serene &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/573237" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Barrinha de Esmoriz Nature Reserve&lt;/a&gt;, and the expansive Ovar Dunes Forest with its dense pine trees. Many routes also pass by beautiful beaches like Furadouro and Cortegaça.

Q: What do other cyclists say about touring cycling in Ovar?
A: The touring cycling routes in Ovar are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.1 stars from over 60 reviews. Cyclists often praise the well-maintained cycle paths, the stunning coastal scenery, and the peaceful rides through pine forests and along the Ria de Aveiro.

Q: Are there any routes that offer coastal views?
A: Absolutely. Ovar is renowned for its coastal beauty. Routes like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1386825144/praia-da-barrinha-from-praia-do-furadouro" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Praia da Barrinha from Praia do Furadouro&lt;/a&gt; offer continuous views of the ocean and beaches. The region boasts a 10 km section linking the beaches of Esmoriz and Furadouro, perfect for scenic coastal rides.

Q: What is the best time of year to go touring cycling in Ovar?
A: Ovar is generally pleasant for cycling for much of the year. Spring and autumn offer mild temperatures and fewer crowds, making them ideal. Summer can be warm, but coastal breezes and shaded forest paths provide relief. Winters are typically mild, allowing for year-round cycling, though some days may be cooler or wetter.

Q: Are there options for beginner touring cyclists?
A: Yes, Ovar is very welcoming for beginners. Many routes are classified as 'easy' and feature flat, well-paved cycle paths, making them perfect for those new to touring cycling or looking for a relaxed ride. The municipality's focus on extensive cycle networks ensures accessibility for all skill levels.

Q: Where can I find routes that pass through pine forests?
A: The Ovar Dunes Forest is a key feature of the region, offering numerous routes through dense pine forests. 'The Forest Path' is a specific 15-kilometer route between Cortegaça and Furadouro that winds through these shaded woodlands, providing a unique natural environment and stops at various beaches.

Q: Is public transport available to access the cycling routes in Ovar?
A: Ovar has initiatives like a public bicycle-sharing program (BIA) with free-to-use bicycles in several parks, which can help with local access. For reaching Ovar itself, regional train services connect to nearby cities, and local buses can help you get closer to specific starting points for routes.

Q: What are some longer touring cycling routes in Ovar?
A: For those seeking longer rides, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/19798157" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cais da Bestida – View of Ria de Aveiro loop from Ovar&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 37.8-mile (60.9 km) route. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1386829762/grande-rota-da-ria-de-aveiro-ovar-loop" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Grande Rota da Ria de Aveiro - Ovar Loop&lt;/a&gt; also offers a substantial 31.6-mile (50.9 km) journey, exploring the unique landscapes of the Ria.

Q: Are there any routes that allow me to explore the local culture or towns?
A: While primarily focused on natural landscapes, many cycling routes in Ovar are designed to pass through or near local towns and villages. This allows cyclists to easily access and explore local attractions, including historical sites, museums, and quaint cafes. You can also admire the famous 'azulejos' (ceramic tiles) that adorn many buildings in &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2924364" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ovar Town Centre&lt;/a&gt; and churches.
tips: At the North end of the main beach esplanade the trails continue for the more remote beaches, most are accessible by bike via wooden boardwalks. Excellent public warm showers and restrooms.

Excellent paved section of the EuvoVelo 1 transeuropean bike trail. Much of this part is pleasantly shaded by pine trees, in a nice distance from the road, and with several opportunities for getting to the dunes and the beach it runs parallel to.

Praia da Barrinha in Esmoriz is a fascinating place, very popular with surfers. Although it requires care from bathers due to the dangerous sea, it is possible to enjoy it by taking the necessary precautions. It is famous for the palaces that cross the dunes.

waypoints.name: Atlantic Cycle Path and the Dunes of Ovar
